heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 88–131, § 377 Stat. 194Sept. 24, 1963
label: 146 to 146k Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 88–131, § 377 Stat. 194Sept. 24, 1963
notes: Section 146, , Pt. C, , provided methods of obeying and construing sections 146 to 146k, suggestion for ascertainment of risk of collision, and advice concerning the operation of seaplanes.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 417

Section 146f, , Pt. C, , related to crossing ahead of vessel having right of way.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 418
Section 146g, , Pt. C, , related to duty of power-driven vessel to slacken speed.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 418
Section 146h, , Pt. C, , provided that overtaking vessel keep out of the way of the overtaken vessel, defined “overtaken vessel”.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 418
Section 146i, , Pt. C, , related to power-driven vessels in narrow channels and in nearing bends in a channel.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 419

Section 146k, , Pt. C, , related to special circumstances requiring departure from rules.act Oct. 11, 1951, ch. 495, § 665 Stat. 419
